label: 1511 CE
era_summary: Year 1511 (MDXI) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1511: Pope, Spain, Venice, Swiss Con, emperor, England-France, Scotland, Florence, 1511-14. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
